'''Gabby''' was a pilot for the [[Astrographic Survey Institute]]. He overflew more than a thousand [[Planet/Legends|planets]], though setting foot on only three of these.

Gabby was piloting ''[[Astrolabe]]'' on its rerouted mission to scout the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] when it was destroyed by ''[[Purity]]'' near [[Doornik-1142/Legends|Doornik-1142]].
